findings.title: Remove dead schema files (queries_broken.py, mutations_full.py)
findings.what: Delete queries_broken.py (160 lines) and mutations_full.py (422 lines) — leftover deprecated/backup files that serve no purpose
findings.why: Dead code creates confusion for anyone navigating the backend, risks accidental imports, and inflates the codebase

findings.title: Pin wildcard dependency versions (clsx, tailwind-merge)
findings.what: Replace "*" versions for clsx and tailwind-merge with specific semver ranges (e.g. ^2.1.1 and ^3.0.2)
findings.why: Wildcard versions can pull breaking changes on any install, causing non-reproducible builds and potential runtime failures

findings.title: Replace print statements with Python logging module
findings.what: Replace ~20 print() calls across ai_service.py (lines 97,128,378,529,613,623,694,817,965), matplotlib_crochet_service.py (lines 43,55,59), and main.py (lines 22-25,53) with proper logging.getLogger() calls at appropriate log levels
findings.why: Print statements are invisible in production Docker logs configured for structured logging, make debugging harder, and can't be filtered by severity

findings.title: Add .env.example files for onboarding
findings.what: Create .env.example files documenting all required environment variables (GEMINI_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL, CORS_ORIGINS, NEXT_PUBLIC_GRAPHQL_URL, etc.) with placeholder values
findings.why: No .env.example exists — new developers or future-you after a server rebuild have to reverse-engineer required config from CLAUDE.md and source code

findings.title: Add GraphQL input length validation
findings.what: Add max-length validation on string inputs in GraphQL mutations — particularly chatWithAssistant message (line 373) and pattern creation fields. Reject payloads over reasonable limits (e.g. 50KB for chat messages)
findings.why: No input validation means a single request with a multi-MB message payload could exhaust AI API tokens or cause OOM in the backend

findings.title: Configure SQLAlchemy connection pooling for production
findings.what: Add pool_pre_ping=True, pool_size=5, max_overflow=10, and connect_args with statement_timeout to the create_engine call
findings.why: Current config uses SQLAlchemy defaults with no connection health checks — stale connections after Postgres restarts cause 500 errors until the backend container is restarted

findings.title: Add request logging middleware to FastAPI
findings.what: Add a simple Starlette middleware that logs method, path, status code, and response time for each request. Use Python logging module at INFO level
findings.why: No visibility into which endpoints are being hit, how often, or how slow they are — essential for debugging production issues and understanding usage patterns
